SEARCH
Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user

Class ChatAdministratorRights

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user.ChatAdministratorRights
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ChatAdministratorRights extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the rights of an administrator in a chat.
Since:
3 March 2025
Version:
1.3.0
Author:
Natanim
